prompt: Add a confirmation modal to approve a mitra application from the Control Tower row action
expected_avoid: writing a custom modal from scratch
MUI Dialog freshly introduced just for this (allowed if already used in this page, but prefer @dash primitive)
antd Modal freshly introduced just for this (same reasoning)
expected_use: @dash/button tone='primary' style='filled' for Approve, tone='neutral' style='stroke' for Cancel
axios call on confirm hitting /mgmt/v1/mitra/:id/approve with NextAuth bearer
expected_pattern_ref: Decision tree — Overlays (rules L69-77); Anti-Pattern Catalog 'Custom Modal' (rules L336); Refuse anti-pattern #8 'force MUI/antd' (rules L584); Button anatomy (rules L150-164)
context_notes: backoffice tolerates MUI+antd+Tailwind coexistence — if the page already uses MUI Dialog, swapping mid-page can cause visual mismatch. Greenfield section here should use @dash/modal; existing MUI/antd modals should be left alone (no force-convert). Approval is not strictly destructive — modal is fine, alert-dialog optional.
